policy: Cross-cutting runtime/bridge/workflow modules must be domain-mapped and referenced by declared entrypoints or smoke targets; generic orphan modules fail the convergence gate.

MindRiver context runtime visibility and operator card summaries
domain_mappings.mindriver/context_bridge_ops.py: MindRiver context handoff probe and profile isolation checks
domain_mappings.mindriver/memory.py: MemoryStore protocol fields: clients, status, supersedes, cognitive_type + integrity audit
domain_mappings.scripts/memory_bridge.py: Memory bridge adapter for diagnostic context persistence
